description.name: Finca las Rosas
description.headline: Rural Andalusian Finca with Pool, Near Ronda
description.description: A classic Andalusian finca set among olive groves outside Ronda. The large garden, swimming pool, and outdoor dining area are perfect for slow summer days. The surrounding countryside offers excellent hiking.

reviews: We brought our two dogs — they absolutely loved the garden. So much space to run. The pool was perfect.
Pet paradise! Our labrador had the time of his life here. The finca is gorgeous and very dog-friendly.
Came with the family and our rescue greyhound. The terrace was a favourite spot for all of us, two-legged and four-legged alike.
Great property. Beautiful setting. Our puppy approved of the garden.

policies.cancellation_policy: 50% refund if cancelled 30 or more days before check-in.
policies.payment_schedule: 30% deposit at booking, balance 30 days before arrival.
